title: Getting Started
description: Week 0: Getting Started with Python fundamentals
content: Week 0 covers Python basics, variables, types, operators, control flow, loops, data structures, functions, modules, file I/O, and error handling.

title: Fundamentals
content: Week 1 covers math operations, string manipulation, arrays, hash tables, matrices, and recursion.

title: Advanced Fundamentals
content: Week 2 covers file handling, exception handling, modules, functional programming, and testing.

title: OOP Basics
content: Week 3 introduces classes, objects, methods, attributes, encapsulation, and basic OOP principles.

title: Day 1: Classes and Objects
description: Day 1 covers creating classes, instances, and basic object-oriented concepts.
content: Learn to define classes, create objects, and work with instance attributes and methods.

title: Day 12: Lists
description: Day 12 covers Python lists - creation, access, manipulation, and common operations.
content: Learn about Python lists: creating lists, indexing, slicing, appending, sorting, and list comprehensions.

title: Create and Access List
description: Create a list and access elements by index
content:
def create_and_access():
    """Create a list and return the first and last elements"""
    my_list = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
    return my_list[0], my_list[-1]

title: Person Class
description: Create a Person class with name and age attributes

title: Bank Account Class
description: Create a BankAccount class with deposit and withdraw methods

title: Inheritance Basics
description: Create a base class and derived class to demonstrate inheritance

title: Abstract Base Class
description: Create an abstract base class using ABC module

title: Classes
description: Problems and exercises related to Python classes
content: Learn about Python classes: defining classes, creating instances, methods, attributes, and OOP principles.

title: Inheritance
description: Problems and exercises related to inheritance
content: Learn about inheritance: parent and child classes, method overriding, super(), and code reuse.

title: Lists
description: Problems and exercises related to Python lists
content: Learn about Python lists: creation, indexing, slicing, methods, and list comprehensions.

title: Dictionaries
description: Problems and exercises related to Python dictionaries
content: Learn about Python dictionaries: key-value pairs, methods, and dictionary comprehensions.
